# asana

This is the interface for interacting with the [Asana Platform](https://developers.asana.com). Our API reference is generated from our [OpenAPI spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Asana/openapi/master/defs/asana_oas.yaml).

This file is the agent-facing overview of the `asana` CLI. It explains what the tool does and how to use it well — *not* every flag of every command. For per-command details run `asana <command> --help` or `asana <command> --schema` (returns JSON).

## Install

The binary is `asana`. Build from source or download a release.

## Authentication

-  — set `ASANA_BEARER_TOKEN`

Run `asana configure` to set credentials interactively.

## Commands

asana groups operations by resource. One or two examples per group below — for the full set of commands and flags use `asana <group> --help`.

### `allocations`

```bash
asana allocations create-record --body '{...}'    # Create an allocation
```

```bash
asana allocations delete-allocation-by-id --allocation-gid <string>    # Delete an allocation
```

List all commands in this group: `asana allocations --help`

### `attachments`

```bash
asana attachments delete-specific --attachment-gid <string>    # Delete an attachment
```

```bash
asana attachments get-all-for-object --parent <string>    # Get attachments from an object
```

List all commands in this group: `asana attachments --help`

### `audit-log-api`

```bash
asana audit-log-api get-audit-log-events --workspace-gid <string>    # Get audit log events
```

List all commands in this group: `asana audit-log-api --help`

### `batch-api`

```bash
asana batch-api submit-parallel-requests --body '{...}'    # Submit parallel requests
```

List all commands in this group: `asana batch-api --help`

### `custom-field-settings`

```bash
asana custom-field-settings get-portfolio-custom-field-settings --portfolio-gid <string>    # Get a portfolio's custom fields
```

```bash
asana custom-field-settings get-project-custom-field-settings --project-gid <string>    # Get a project's custom fields
```

List all commands in this group: `asana custom-field-settings --help`

### `custom-fields`

```bash
asana custom-fields add-enum-option --custom-field-gid <string>    # Create an enum option
```

```bash
asana custom-fields create-new-field-record --body '{...}'    # Create a custom field
```

List all commands in this group: `asana custom-fields --help`

### `events`

```bash
asana events get-resource-events --resource <string>    # Get events on a resource
```

List all commands in this group: `asana events --help`

### `goal-relationships`

```bash
asana goal-relationships create-supporting-relationship --goal-gid <string> --body '{...}'    # Add a supporting goal relationship
```

```bash
asana goal-relationships get-compact-records --supported-goal <string>    # Get goal relationships
```

List all commands in this group: `asana goal-relationships --help`

### `goals`

```bash
asana goals add-collaborators-to-goal --goal-gid <string> --body '{...}'    # Add a collaborator to a goal
```

```bash
asana goals create-metric --goal-gid <string> --body '{...}'    # Create a goal metric
```

List all commands in this group: `asana goals --help`

### `jobs`

```bash
asana jobs get-by-id --job-gid <string>    # Get a job by id
```

List all commands in this group: `asana jobs --help`

### `memberships`

```bash
asana memberships create-new-record    # Create a membership
```

```bash
asana memberships delete-record --membership-gid <string>    # Delete a membership
```

List all commands in this group: `asana memberships --help`

### `organization-exports`

```bash
asana organization-exports create-export-request --body '{...}'    # Create an organization export request
```

```bash
asana organization-exports get-export-details --organization-export-gid <string>    # Get details on an org export request
```

List all commands in this group: `asana organization-exports --help`

### `portfolio-memberships`

```bash
asana portfolio-memberships get-compact --portfolio-gid <string>    # Get memberships from a portfolio
```

```bash
asana portfolio-memberships get-complete-record --portfolio-membership-gid <string>    # Get a portfolio membership
```

List all commands in this group: `asana portfolio-memberships --help`

### `portfolios`

```bash
asana portfolios add-custom-field-setting --portfolio-gid <string> --body '{...}'    # Add a custom field to a portfolio
```

```bash
asana portfolios add-members-to-portfolio --portfolio-gid <string> --body '{...}'    # Add users to a portfolio
```

List all commands in this group: `asana portfolios --help`

### `project-briefs`

```bash
asana project-briefs create-new-record --project-gid <string> --body '{...}'    # Create a project brief
```

```bash
asana project-briefs get-full-record --project-brief-gid <string>    # Get a project brief
```

List all commands in this group: `asana project-briefs --help`

### `project-memberships`

```bash
asana project-memberships get-compact-records --project-gid <string>    # Get memberships from a project
```

```bash
asana project-memberships get-record --project-membership-gid <string>    # Get a project membership
```

List all commands in this group: `asana project-memberships --help`

### `project-statuses`

```bash
asana project-statuses create-new-status-update-record --project-gid <string> --body '{...}'    # Create a project status
```

```bash
asana project-statuses delete-specific-status-update --project-status-gid <string>    # Delete a project status
```

List all commands in this group: `asana project-statuses --help`

### `project-templates`

```bash
asana project-templates delete-template-record --project-template-gid <string>    # Delete a project template
```

```bash
asana project-templates get-all-template-records --team-gid <string>    # Get a team's project templates
```

List all commands in this group: `asana project-templates --help`

### `projects`

```bash
asana projects add-custom-field-setting --project-gid <string> --body '{...}'    # Add a custom field to a project
```

```bash
asana projects add-followers-to-project --project-gid <string> --body '{...}'    # Add followers to a project
```

List all commands in this group: `asana projects --help`

### `rules`

```bash
asana rules trigger-rule-request --rule-trigger-gid <string> --body '{...}'    # Trigger a rule
```

List all commands in this group: `asana rules --help`

### `sections`

```bash
asana sections add-task-to-section --section-gid <string>    # Add task to section
```

```bash
asana sections create-new-section --project-gid <string>    # Create a section in a project
```

List all commands in this group: `asana sections --help`

### `status-updates`

```bash
asana status-updates create-new-status-update-record --body '{...}'    # Create a status update
```

```bash
asana status-updates delete-specific-status-update --status-update-gid <string>    # Delete a status update
```

List all commands in this group: `asana status-updates --help`

### `stories`

```bash
asana stories create-comment --task-gid <string> --body '{...}'    # Create a story on a task
```

```bash
asana stories delete-story-record --story-gid <string>    # Delete a story
```

List all commands in this group: `asana stories --help`

### `tags`

```bash
asana tags create-new-tag-record --body '{...}'    # Create a tag
```

```bash
asana tags create-tag-in-workspace --workspace-gid <string> --body '{...}'    # Create a tag in a workspace
```

List all commands in this group: `asana tags --help`

### `task-templates`

```bash
asana task-templates delete-task-template --task-template-gid <string>    # Delete a task template
```

```bash
asana task-templates get-single-template --task-template-gid <string>    # Get a task template
```

List all commands in this group: `asana task-templates --help`

### `tasks`

```bash
asana tasks add-followers-to-task --task-gid <string> --body '{...}'    # Add followers to a task
```

```bash
asana tasks add-project-to-task --task-gid <string> --body '{...}'    # Add a project to a task
```

List all commands in this group: `asana tasks --help`

### `team-memberships`

```bash
asana team-memberships get-compact --team-gid <string>    # Get memberships from a team
```

```bash
asana team-memberships get-compact-records    # Get team memberships
```

List all commands in this group: `asana team-memberships --help`

### `teams`

```bash
asana teams add-user-to-team --team-gid <string> --body '{...}'    # Add a user to a team
```

```bash
asana teams create-team-record --body '{...}'    # Create a team
```

List all commands in this group: `asana teams --help`

### `time-periods`

```bash
asana time-periods get-compact-time-periods --workspace <string>    # Get time periods
```

```bash
asana time-periods get-full-record --time-period-gid <string>    # Get a time period
```

List all commands in this group: `asana time-periods --help`

### `time-tracking-entries`

```bash
asana time-tracking-entries create-new-time-entry-record --task-gid <string> --body '{...}'    # Create a time tracking entry
```

```bash
asana time-tracking-entries delete-time-entry --time-tracking-entry-gid <string>    # Delete a time tracking entry
```

List all commands in this group: `asana time-tracking-entries --help`

### `typeahead`

```bash
asana typeahead get-results --workspace-gid <string> --resource-type <string>    # Get objects via typeahead
```

List all commands in this group: `asana typeahead --help`

### `user-task-lists`

```bash
asana user-task-lists get-record --user-task-list-gid <string>    # Get a user task list
```

```bash
asana user-task-lists get-user-task-list --user-gid <string> --workspace <string>    # Get a user's task list
```

List all commands in this group: `asana user-task-lists --help`

### `users`

```bash
asana users get-favorites-for-user --user-gid <string> --resource-type <string> --workspace <string>    # Get a user's favorites
```

```bash
asana users get-user-record --user-gid <string>    # Get a user
```

List all commands in this group: `asana users --help`

### `webhooks`

```bash
asana webhooks establish-webhook --body '{...}'    # Establish a webhook
```

```bash
asana webhooks get-webhook-record --webhook-gid <string>    # Get a webhook
```

List all commands in this group: `asana webhooks --help`

### `workspace-memberships`

```bash
asana workspace-memberships get-record-by-id --workspace-membership-gid <string>    # Get a workspace membership
```

```bash
asana workspace-memberships get-user-memberships --user-gid <string>    # Get workspace memberships for a user
```

List all commands in this group: `asana workspace-memberships --help`

### `workspaces`

```bash
asana workspaces add-user-to-workspace --workspace-gid <string> --body '{...}'    # Add a user to a workspace or organization
```

```bash
asana workspaces get-workspace-record --workspace-gid <string>    # Get a workspace
```

List all commands in this group: `asana workspaces --help`


## Output and parsing

All output is JSON by default and goes to stdout. Errors go to stderr as a single-line JSON object — stdout stays clean for piping.

```bash
asana <cmd> --jq <path>          # extract fields without jq installed (GJSON syntax)
asana <cmd> -o yaml              # change format: json (default), yaml, table, compact, raw, pretty
asana <cmd> --dry-run            # print the HTTP request without sending it
asana <cmd> --schema             # JSON schema of inputs and outputs for that command
```

GJSON path examples:
- `--jq id` — scalar
- `--jq items.#.id` — every id from an array
- `--jq "items.#(active==true)#"` — filter array by condition

## Exit codes

Branch on `$?` rather than parsing stderr:

| Code | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| 0 | success |
| 1 | unknown error |
| 2 | auth failed (401 / 403) |
| 3 | not found (404) |
| 4 | validation error (400 / 422) |
| 5 | rate limited (429) |
| 6 | server error (5xx) |
| 7 | network error |

Error JSON shape on stderr:
```json
{"error":true,"code":"not_found","status":404,"message":"...","exit_code":3}
```

## Common workflows

### List then fetch one
```bash
ID=$(asana <group> list --jq "items.0.id")
asana <group> get --id "$ID"
```

### Capture a created ID
```bash
ID=$(asana <group> create [flags] --jq id)
```

### Safe destructive call
```bash
asana <group> delete --id X --dry-run    # inspect first
asana <group> delete --id X              # exit 0 = deleted, 3 = not found
```

### Branch on exit code
```bash
asana <cmd> [flags]
case $? in
  0) : success ;;
  2) echo "fix credentials" ;;
  3) echo "not found, skip" ;;
  5) sleep 10 ; retry ;;
esac
```

## Discovering more

```bash
asana --help                              # top-level groups
asana <group> --help                      # commands in a group
asana <group> <cmd> --help                # flags + description
asana <group> <cmd> --schema              # JSON schema
asana agent-instructions                  # this file, embedded in the binary
```
